sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
seg = current_frame.segmentation
for n in seg['nodes']:
    b = n['boundary']
    min_r = min(p[0] for p in b)
    max_r = max(p[0] for p in b)
    min_c = min(p[1] for p in b)
    max_c = max(p[1] for p in b)
    print(f"id={n['id']} color={n['color']} pixels={n['pixels']} bbox=[{min_r},{min_c}]-[{max_r},{max_c}]")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
